confirmReextract: Replace the current actions with a fresh extraction?
noActionsFound: No actions were found in this transcript.
confirmTranslate: Translate to {{language}}? This replaces any edited or previously translated text.
confirmMerge: Merge consecutive rows from the same speaker into single blocks? Re-transcribe to undo.
emailedTranscript: Transcript emailed to your account address.
reidentified: Re-ran speaker identification against your current voiceprints.
confirmDeleteAudio: Delete the audio for "{{name}}"? The transcript is kept and its storage is freed; this can't be undone.
confirmDeleteAudioBulk_one: Delete the audio for {{count}} recording? Their transcripts are kept and storage is freed; this can't be undone.
confirmDeleteAudioBulk_other: Delete the audio for {{count}} recordings? Their transcripts are kept and storage is freed; this can't be undone.
confirmMergeRecordings_one: Merge {{count}} recording? This is a no-op (select at least two).
confirmMergeRecordings_other: Merge {{count}} recordings into the earliest one? Their transcripts and audio are combined and the others are deleted. This can't be undone.
noTranscriptYet: No transcript yet — it appears here automatically when transcription finishes.
mergeRowsTitle: Combine consecutive rows from the same speaker into single blocks
toggleViewTitle: Switch between the model's original words and your edited/translated version
retranscribeHelp: Optionally tell the diarizer how many speakers to expect. If two people were merged into one speaker, set the minimum to 2. Leave blank for automatic detection.
retranscribeRevisionsWarning: This transcript has edited or translated segments. Re-transcribing produces a fresh transcript from the model — your edits and translations won't carry over to it.
autoNameTitle: Name applied automatically by speaker identification
revisedTitle: This segment has been edited or translated
noRecordings: No recordings yet. Hit Record above, or drop audio files here.
confirmDeleteSection: Delete section "{{name}}"? Its recordings move to Ungrouped.
dragSection: Drag {{name}} to reorder or move it
noActions: No actions identified — add one below.
emptyWelcomeBody: Press Record or Upload at the top to add your first recording — it'll be transcribed and appear in the list on the left.
emptySelectBody: Choose a recording from the list, or press Record / Upload to add another.
recUploadTitle: Upload audio files to transcribe (or drag them onto the recordings panel)
